text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: OUCH! I never would've imagined such pain!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
But now, I can see it... The pain of this injury
causes a constant irritation from within.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Yes, but an injury of this severity...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
I should take this opportunity to investigate it as
much as I can.
choice_data_list: Whatever the case, you should rest.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Don't worry. It'll heal up in no time at all. With a
little treatment and some observation...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Oh... Come on. Don't glare at me like that.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Fine, fine. I'll let you take care of the injury for
now.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I look after Agnes Tachyon, who seems to have
resigned herself to her fate.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Huh? Aren't you supposed to stop me because
you're worried?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: What if the injury gets worse?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Sigh... Either way, I don't think I can think straight while in so much pain.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I carefully tend to Agnes Tachyon's injury as she
groans loudly from the pain.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Heh-heh. I thought you'd say that!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
You can carry my luggage, massage my
shoulders... Hmmm, and a slew of other things
too!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: In the meantime, I'll investigate this injury!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Even her own injuries seem to be a part of her
research. Despite the pain, Agnes Tachyon seems
to be in a good mood.
